title: Happy holidays! A message from YKHC President & CEO
summary: Happy Holidays! Congratulations to YKHC’s Elder Home for being awarded its second consecutive annual Quality Improvement Award by Mountain Pacific, Alaska’s healthcare quality improvement organization. Like any journey towards quality, it has been a long and arduous one, and definitely very rewarding. Operating...

title: November 2024 Monthly Manager’s Report
summary: November 12, 2024 SUMMARY Hello, everyone! I imagine many of us are relieved the general election has wrapped up. It’s a nice break from the constant stream of campaign ads and texts. Congratulations to those whose candidates came out on top. Regardless of the results, one thing is certain—we’re moving into a time of new challenges and opportunities. It’s a busy season here at HEA, as always. With Thanksgiving around the corner, it’s a good time to pause and reflect on where we are and the people and decisions that have positively shaped our journey as a Cooperative. Looking ahead, November is shaping up...
